name: Abaqus
description: Advanced finite element analysis software from Dassault Systemes. Excels at nonlinear analysis, composite structures, and crash/impact simulation — critical for aerospace applications where materials are pushed to their limits.
whyUseIt: Abaqus handles the nonlinear structural problems that simpler FEA tools struggle with — composite failure, thermal-structural coupling, and large deformation analysis. When a rocket structure operates near its limits, Abaqus provides the fidelity needed for safe certification.

vocabulary.definition: Analysis where material properties, geometry, or contacts change with load — essential for crash and failure studies
Time-stepping solver for dynamic/impact problems — does not require matrix inversion, handles contact well

beginnerMistakes: Using linear analysis when nonlinear effects are significant
Not validating material models against test data
Running computationally expensive analyses without first checking with simpler models
